mapper.select: SELECT i.symbol, COALESCE(p.name, i.name) AS name, COALESCE(i.sector, '-') AS sector, COUNT(c.trade_date) AS candleCount, MIN(c.trade_date) AS firstTradeDate, MAX(c.trade_date) AS lastTradeDate FROM index_constituent i LEFT JOIN company_profile p ON p.symbol = i.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_candle_daily c ON c.symbol = i.symbol WHERE i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' GROUP BY i.symbol, COALESCE(p.name, i.name), COALESCE(i.sector, '-') ORDER BY COUNT(c.trade_date), i.symbol

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_signal_snapshot s INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = s.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_signal_backtest_result r INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = r.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_signal_backtest_result r INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = r.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' WHERE r.horizon_days = #{horizonDays}

SELECT s.id, s.symbol, s.signal_date, s.snapshot_mode, s.calculated_at, s.signal_version, s.integrated_score, s.integrated_label, s.tone, s.confidence, s.summary, s.valuation_score, s.valuation_label, s.quality_score, s.quality_label, s.growth_score, s.growth_label, s.stability_score, s.stability_label, s.earnings_score, s.earnings_label, s.analyst_score, s.analyst_label, s.news_score, s.news_label, s.momentum_score, s.momentum_label, s.risk_score, s.risk_label, s.institution_score, s.institution_label, s.data_quality_score, s.data_quality_excluded_metric_count, s.data_quality_issue_count, s.reasons_json, s.cards_json, s.source_freshness_json, s.raw_json FROM stock_signal_snapshot s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT snapshot_id, COUNT(*) AS completed_count, MAX(calculated_at) AS latest_result_calculated_at, SUM(CASE WHEN institution_score IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_institution_count FROM stock_signal_backtest_result GROUP BY snapshot_id ) r ON r.snapshot_id = s.id WHERE COALESCE(r.completed_count, 0) < 3 OR r.latest_result_calculated_at < s.calculated_at OR (s.institution_score IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(r.missing_institution_count, 0) > 0) ORDER BY s.signal_date DESC, s.symbol LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT symbol, trade_date AS tradeDate, open_price AS openPrice, high_price AS highPrice, low_price AS lowPrice, close_price AS closePrice, volume, source, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM stock_candle_daily WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND trade_date > #{signalDate} ORDER BY trade_date LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT c.symbol, c.trade_date AS tradeDate, c.open_price AS openPrice, c.high_price AS highPrice, c.low_price AS lowPrice, c.close_price AS closePrice, c.volume, c.source, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM stock_candle_daily c INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = c.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' WHERE c.trade_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY c.symbol, c.trade_date

SELECT r.symbol, r.signal_date AS signalDate, r.beta, r.volatility_pct AS volatilityPct, r.avg_dollar_volume AS avgDollarVolume, r.observations, r.source, r.calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_risk_snapshot r INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = r.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' WHERE r.signal_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY r.symbol, r.signal_date

SELECT r.symbol, r.signal_date AS signalDate, r.beta, r.volatility_pct AS volatilityPct, r.avg_dollar_volume AS avgDollarVolume, r.observations, r.source, r.calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_risk_snapshot r WHERE r.symbol = #{symbol} AND r.signal_date = ( SELECT MAX(signal_date) FROM stock_risk_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_market_snapshot ( index_code, symbol, snapshot_date, sector, industry, exchange, market, currency, close_price, volume, shares_outstanding, market_cap_usd, price_source, shares_source, market_cap_source ) SELECT #{indexCode} AS index_code, c.symbol, c.trade_date AS snapshot_date, COALESCE(m.sector, i.sector, '-') AS sector, m.industry, COALESCE(p.exchange, m.exchange, i.exchange) AS exchange, t.market, COALESCE(t.currency, p.currency, 'USD') AS currency, c.close_price, c.volume, CASE WHEN s.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND s.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN s.shares_outstanding WHEN t.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND t.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN t.shares_outstanding WHEN p.share_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND p.share_outstanding > 0 THEN p.share_outstanding * 1000000 ELSE NULL END AS shares_outstanding, CASE WHEN s.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND s.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN c.close_price * s.shares_outstanding WHEN t.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND t.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN c.close_price * t.shares_outstanding WHEN p.share_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND p.share_outstanding > 0 THEN c.close_price * p.share_outstanding * 1000000 WHEN p.market_cap IS NOT NULL AND p.market_cap > 0 THEN p.market_cap * 1000000 ELSE NULL END AS market_cap_usd, c.source AS price_source, CASE WHEN s.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND s.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN s.source WHEN t.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND t.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN 'TOSS_CURRENT' WHEN p.share_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND p.share_outstanding > 0 THEN CASE WHEN pa.data_symbol IS NOT NULL THEN 'FINNHUB_CURRENT_ALIAS' ELSE 'FINNHUB_CURRENT' END ELSE NULL END AS shares_source, CASE WHEN s.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND s.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN CONCAT('PRICE_X_', s.source) WHEN t.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND t.shares_outstanding > 0 THEN 'PRICE_X_TOSS_CURRENT_SHARES' WHEN p.share_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND p.share_outstanding > 0 THEN CASE WHEN pa.data_symbol IS NOT NULL THEN 'PRICE_X_FINNHUB_CURRENT_ALIAS_SHARES' ELSE 'PRICE_X_FINNHUB_CURRENT_SHARES' END WHEN p.market_cap IS NOT NULL AND p.market_cap > 0 THEN CASE WHEN pa.data_symbol IS NOT NULL THEN 'FINNHUB_CURRENT_ALIAS_MARKET_CAP' ELSE 'FINNHUB_CURRENT_MARKET_CAP' END ELSE NULL END AS market_cap_source FROM stock_candle_daily c LEFT JOIN stock_index_membership_snapshot m ON m.index_code = #{indexCode} AND m.symbol = c.symbol AND m.snapshot_date = c.trade_date LEFT JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = c.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} LEFT JOIN stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot s ON s.index_code = #{indexCode} AND s.symbol = c.symbol AND s.snapshot_date = c.trade_date LEFT JOIN toss_stock_info t ON t.symbol = c.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_symbol_data_alias pa ON pa.symbol = c.symbol AND pa.data_source = 'PROFILE' AND pa.active = TRUE LEFT JOIN company_profile p ON p.symbol = COALESCE(pa.data_symbol, c.symbol) WHERE c.trade_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} AND c.close_price IS NOT NULL AND c.close_price > 0 AND c.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(m.sector, i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' AND COALESCE(m.is_member, i.current_member, FALSE) = TRUE AND ( (s.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND s.shares_outstanding > 0) OR (t.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND t.shares_outstanding > 0) OR (p.share_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND p.share_outstanding > 0) OR (p.market_cap IS NOT NULL AND p.market_cap > 0) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sector = VALUES(sector), industry = VALUES(industry), exchange = VALUES(exchange), market = VALUES(market), currency = VALUES(currency), close_price = VALUES(close_price), volume = VALUES(volume), shares_outstanding = VALUES(shares_outstanding), market_cap_usd = VALUES(market_cap_usd), price_source = VALUES(price_source), shares_source = VALUES(shares_source), market_cap_source = VALUES(market_cap_source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.update: UPDATE stock_index_membership_snapshot m LEFT JOIN index_constituent i ON i.index_code = m.index_code AND i.symbol = m.symbol SET m.is_member = FALSE, m.source = 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY_REMOVED', m.calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE m.index_code = #{indexCode} AND m.snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} AND m.source LIKE 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY%' AND ( i.symbol IS NULL OR i.current_member = FALSE OR m.symbol IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') OR UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) = 'TICKER' )
mapper.delete: DELETE ms FROM stock_market_snapshot ms LEFT JOIN stock_index_membership_snapshot m ON m.index_code = ms.index_code AND m.symbol = ms.symbol AND m.snapshot_date = ms.snapshot_date LEFT JOIN index_constituent i ON i.index_code = ms.index_code AND i.symbol = ms.symbol WHERE ms.index_code = #{indexCode} AND ms.snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} AND ( COALESCE(m.is_member, i.current_member, FALSE) = FALSE OR ms.market_cap_usd IS NULL OR ms.market_cap_usd <= 0 )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_index_membership_snapshot ( index_code, symbol, snapshot_date, sector, industry, exchange, is_member, source ) SELECT #{indexCode} AS index_code, i.symbol, d.snapshot_date, COALESCE(i.sector, '-') AS sector, NULL AS industry, i.exchange, TRUE AS is_member, 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY' AS source FROM index_constituent i INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT c.trade_date AS snapshot_date FROM stock_candle_daily c INNER JOIN index_constituent ci ON ci.symbol = c.symbol AND ci.index_code = #{indexCode} AND ci.current_member = TRUE WHERE c.trade_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ) d WHERE i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sector = CASE WHEN stock_index_membership_snapshot.source LIKE 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY%' THEN VALUES(sector) ELSE stock_index_membership_snapshot.sector END, industry = CASE WHEN stock_index_membership_snapshot.source LIKE 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY%' THEN VALUES(industry) ELSE stock_index_membership_snapshot.industry END, exchange = CASE WHEN stock_index_membership_snapshot.source LIKE 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY%' THEN VALUES(exchange) ELSE stock_index_membership_snapshot.exchange END, is_member = CASE WHEN stock_index_membership_snapshot.source LIKE 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY%' THEN VALUES(is_member) ELSE stock_index_membership_snapshot.is_member END, source = CASE WHEN stock_index_membership_snapshot.source LIKE 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY%' THEN VALUES(source) ELSE stock_index_membership_snapshot.source END, calculated_at = CASE WHEN stock_index_membership_snapshot.source LIKE 'CURRENT_MEMBERSHIP_PROXY%' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE stock_index_membership_snapshot.calculated_at END

INSERT INTO stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot ( index_code, symbol, snapshot_date, shares_outstanding, source ) SELECT index_code, symbol, snapshot_date, shares_outstanding, CASE WHEN shares_source = 'SEC_XBRL_DEI_ENTITY_COMMON_SHARES' THEN shares_source WHEN shares_source LIKE 'TOSS_CURRENT%' THEN 'TOSS_CURRENT_PROXY' WHEN shares_source LIKE 'FINNHUB_CURRENT%' THEN 'FINNHUB_CURRENT_PROXY' WHEN shares_source IS NULL THEN 'MISSING_SHARES' ELSE CONCAT(shares_source, '_PROXY') END AS source FROM stock_market_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE shares_outstanding = CASE WHEN stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source LIKE '%PROXY%' OR stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source = 'MISSING_SHARES' THEN VALUES(shares_outstanding) ELSE stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.shares_outstanding END, source = CASE WHEN stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source LIKE '%PROXY%' OR stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source = 'MISSING_SHARES' THEN VALUES(source) ELSE stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source END, calculated_at = CASE WHEN stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source LIKE '%PROXY%' OR stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source = 'MISSING_SHARES' THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.calculated_at END

INSERT INTO stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot ( index_code, symbol, snapshot_date, shares_outstanding, source ) SELECT #{indexCode} AS index_code, selected.symbol, selected.snapshot_date, selected.shares_outstanding, 'SEC_XBRL_DEI_ENTITY_COMMON_SHARES' AS source FROM ( SELECT base.symbol, base.snapshot_date, ( SELECT f.value FROM stock_sec_fact f WHERE f.symbol = base.sec_symbol AND f.taxonomy = 'dei' AND f.concept = 'EntityCommonStockSharesOutstanding' AND f.unit = 'shares' AND f.value BETWEEN 1000 AND 100000000000 AND f.filed_at IS NOT NULL AND f.filed_at <= base.snapshot_date AND (f.end_date IS NULL OR f.end_date <= base.snapshot_date) ORDER BY f.filed_at DESC, f.end_date DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS shares_outstanding FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT i.symbol, COALESCE(a.data_symbol, i.symbol) AS sec_symbol, c.trade_date AS snapshot_date FROM index_constituent i LEFT JOIN stock_symbol_data_alias a ON a.symbol = i.symbol AND a.data_source = 'SEC' AND a.active = TRUE INNER JOIN stock_candle_daily c ON c.symbol = i.symbol WHERE i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' AND c.trade_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ) base ) selected WHERE selected.shares_outstanding IS NOT NULL AND selected.shares_outstanding > 0 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE shares_outstanding = CASE WHEN stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source LIKE '%PROXY%' OR stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source IN ( 'MISSING_SHARES', 'SEC_XBRL_DEI_ENTITY_COMMON_SHARES' ) THEN VALUES(shares_outstanding) ELSE stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.shares_outstanding END, source = CASE WHEN stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source LIKE '%PROXY%' OR stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source IN ( 'MISSING_SHARES', 'SEC_XBRL_DEI_ENTITY_COMMON_SHARES' ) THEN VALUES(source) ELSE stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source END, calculated_at = CASE WHEN stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source LIKE '%PROXY%' OR stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.source IN ( 'MISSING_SHARES', 'SEC_XBRL_DEI_ENTITY_COMMON_SHARES' ) THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot.calculated_at END
mapper.select: SELECT index_code AS indexCode, symbol, snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, sector, industry, exchange, market, currency, close_price AS closePrice, volume, shares_outstanding AS sharesOutstanding, market_cap_usd AS marketCapUsd, price_source AS priceSource, shares_source AS sharesSource, market_cap_source AS marketCapSource, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_market_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY symbol, snapshot_date

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, trade_date AS tradeDate, benchmark_level AS benchmarkLevel, return_pct AS returnPct, total_market_cap_usd AS totalMarketCapUsd, constituent_count AS constituentCount, coverage_count AS coverageCount, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_benchmark_return_series WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND trade_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY trade_date

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, series_code AS seriesCode, rate_date AS rateDate, annual_rate_pct AS annualRatePct, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_risk_free_rate_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND rate_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY series_code, rate_date

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, series_code AS seriesCode, observation_date AS observationDate, realtime_start AS realtimeStart, realtime_end AS realtimeEnd, value, source FROM stock_macro_vintage_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND observation_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY series_code, observation_date, realtime_start

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, short_rate_pct AS shortRatePct, long_rate_pct AS longRatePct, yield_spread_pct AS yieldSpreadPct, fed_funds_pct AS fedFundsPct, cpi_yoy_pct AS cpiYoyPct, cpi_mom_pct AS cpiMomPct, unemployment_rate_pct AS unemploymentRatePct, unemployment_change_3m_pct AS unemploymentChange3mPct, vix_level AS vixLevel, vix_change_20d_pct AS vixChange20dPct, dollar_index AS dollarIndex, dollar_change_20d_pct AS dollarChange20dPct, macro_tightness_score AS macroTightnessScore, macro_growth_stress_score AS macroGrowthStressScore, macro_risk_score AS macroRiskScore, macro_feature_score AS macroFeatureScore, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_macro_feature_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY snapshot_date

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, short_rate_pct AS shortRatePct, long_rate_pct AS longRatePct, yield_spread_pct AS yieldSpreadPct, fed_funds_pct AS fedFundsPct, cpi_yoy_pct AS cpiYoyPct, cpi_mom_pct AS cpiMomPct, unemployment_rate_pct AS unemploymentRatePct, unemployment_change_3m_pct AS unemploymentChange3mPct, vix_level AS vixLevel, vix_change_20d_pct AS vixChange20dPct, dollar_index AS dollarIndex, dollar_change_20d_pct AS dollarChange20dPct, macro_tightness_score AS macroTightnessScore, macro_growth_stress_score AS macroGrowthStressScore, macro_risk_score AS macroRiskScore, macro_feature_score AS macroFeatureScore, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_macro_feature_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, regime_label AS regimeLabel, macro_score AS macroScore, trend_score AS trendScore, volatility_score AS volatilityScore, breadth_score AS breadthScore, liquidity_score AS liquidityScore, dollar_score AS dollarScore, rate_score AS rateScore, benchmark_return_20d_pct AS benchmarkReturn20dPct, benchmark_return_60d_pct AS benchmarkReturn60dPct, realized_volatility_20d_pct AS realizedVolatility20dPct, realized_volatility_60d_pct AS realizedVolatility60dPct, breadth_advancer_pct AS breadthAdvancerPct, benchmark_coverage_count AS benchmarkCoverageCount, vix_level AS vixLevel, vix_change_20d_pct AS vixChange20dPct, dollar_proxy_return_20d_pct AS dollarProxyReturn20dPct, rate_proxy_return_20d_pct AS rateProxyReturn20dPct, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_macro_regime_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY snapshot_date

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, regime_label AS regimeLabel, macro_score AS macroScore, trend_score AS trendScore, volatility_score AS volatilityScore, breadth_score AS breadthScore, liquidity_score AS liquidityScore, dollar_score AS dollarScore, rate_score AS rateScore, benchmark_return_20d_pct AS benchmarkReturn20dPct, benchmark_return_60d_pct AS benchmarkReturn60dPct, realized_volatility_20d_pct AS realizedVolatility20dPct, realized_volatility_60d_pct AS realizedVolatility60dPct, breadth_advancer_pct AS breadthAdvancerPct, benchmark_coverage_count AS benchmarkCoverageCount, vix_level AS vixLevel, vix_change_20d_pct AS vixChange20dPct, dollar_proxy_return_20d_pct AS dollarProxyReturn20dPct, rate_proxy_return_20d_pct AS rateProxyReturn20dPct, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_macro_regime_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT r.signal_date FROM stock_signal_backtest_result r INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = r.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ORDER BY r.signal_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ranked.symbol FROM ( SELECT r.symbol, MAX(r.integrated_score) AS score, MAX(COALESCE(ms.market_cap_usd, p.market_cap * 1000000, 0)) AS market_cap_usd FROM stock_signal_backtest_result r INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = r.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' LEFT JOIN stock_market_snapshot ms ON ms.index_code = #{indexCode} AND ms.symbol = r.symbol AND ms.snapshot_date = r.signal_date LEFT JOIN company_profile p ON p.symbol = r.symbol WHERE r.signal_date = #{signalDate} GROUP BY r.symbol ) ranked ORDER BY ranked.score DESC, ranked.market_cap_usd DESC, ranked.symbol LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT cov.index_code AS indexCode, cov.snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, cov.symbol_a AS symbolA, cov.symbol_b AS symbolB, corr.correlation, cov.covariance, cov.volatility_a_pct AS volatilityAPct, cov.volatility_b_pct AS volatilityBPct, cov.observations, cov.lookback_days AS lookbackDays, cov.source, cov.calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_covariance_snapshot cov LEFT JOIN stock_correlation_snapshot corr ON corr.index_code = cov.index_code AND corr.snapshot_date = cov.snapshot_date AND corr.symbol_a = cov.symbol_a AND corr.symbol_b = cov.symbol_b WHERE cov.index_code = #{indexCode} AND cov.snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY cov.snapshot_date, cov.symbol_a, cov.symbol_b

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, signal_date AS signalDate, symbol, horizon_days AS horizonDays, expected_return_pct AS expectedReturnPct, expected_excess_return_pct AS expectedExcessReturnPct, return_p10_pct AS returnP10Pct, return_p50_pct AS returnP50Pct, return_p90_pct AS returnP90Pct, excess_p10_pct AS excessP10Pct, excess_p50_pct AS excessP50Pct, excess_p90_pct AS excessP90Pct, upside_probability_pct AS upsideProbabilityPct, calibrated_upside_probability_pct AS calibratedUpsideProbabilityPct, downside_probability_pct AS downsideProbabilityPct, drawdown_risk_pct AS drawdownRiskPct, confidence, sample_count AS sampleCount, sector_sample_count AS sectorSampleCount, score_bucket AS scoreBucket, calibration_bucket AS calibrationBucket, calibration_error_pct AS calibrationErrorPct, model_version AS modelVersion, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND signal_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} AND model_version IN ('EXPECTED_RETURN_V1', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V2', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V3', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V4', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V5', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V6', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V7', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V8', 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9') ORDER BY signal_date, horizon_days, symbol, CASE model_version WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V1' THEN 1 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V2' THEN 2 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V3' THEN 3 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V4' THEN 4 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V5' THEN 5 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V6' THEN 6 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V7' THEN 7 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V8' THEN 8 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' THEN 9 ELSE 0 END

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, model_version AS modelVersion, horizon_days AS horizonDays, probability_bucket AS probabilityBucket, sample_count AS sampleCount, average_predicted_upside_pct AS averagePredictedUpsidePct, actual_upside_rate_pct AS actualUpsideRatePct, calibration_error_pct AS calibrationErrorPct, brier_score AS brierScore, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_expected_return_calibration WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = #{modelVersion} ORDER BY horizon_days, probability_bucket

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, view_version AS viewVersion, generated_at AS generatedAt, source, payload_json AS payloadJson FROM stock_portfolio_view_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND view_version = #{viewVersion} LIMIT 1

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, view_version AS viewVersion, generated_at AS generatedAt, source, payload_json AS payloadJson FROM stock_dashboard_view_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND view_version = #{viewVersion} LIMIT 1

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, view_version AS viewVersion, generated_at AS generatedAt, source, payload_json AS payloadJson FROM stock_backtest_view_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND view_version = #{viewVersion} LIMIT 1

SELECT sl.symbol, COALESCE(p.name, i.name, sl.symbol) AS name, CURRENT_DATE AS signalDate, sl.integrated_score AS integratedScore, sl.valuation_score AS valuationScore, sl.quality_score AS qualityScore, sl.growth_score AS growthScore, sl.stability_score AS stabilityScore, sl.earnings_score AS earningsScore, sl.analyst_score AS analystScore, sl.news_score AS newsScore, sl.momentum_score AS momentumScore, sl.risk_score AS riskScore, sl.institution_score AS institutionScore, dq.quality_score AS dataQualityScore, COALESCE(ms.market_cap_usd, p.market_cap) AS marketCap, COALESCE(i.sector, '-') AS sector, sl.calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_signal_latest sl INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = sl.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' LEFT JOIN company_profile p ON p.symbol = sl.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_data_quality_latest dq ON dq.symbol = sl.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_market_snapshot ms ON ms.index_code = #{indexCode} AND ms.symbol = sl.symbol AND ms.snapshot_date = ( SELECT MAX(snapshot_date) FROM stock_market_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND symbol = sl.symbol ) WHERE sl.integrated_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(ms.market_cap_usd, p.market_cap) DESC, sl.symbol

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, signal_date AS signalDate, symbol, horizon_days AS horizonDays, expected_return_pct AS expectedReturnPct, expected_excess_return_pct AS expectedExcessReturnPct, return_p10_pct AS returnP10Pct, return_p50_pct AS returnP50Pct, return_p90_pct AS returnP90Pct, excess_p10_pct AS excessP10Pct, excess_p50_pct AS excessP50Pct, excess_p90_pct AS excessP90Pct, upside_probability_pct AS upsideProbabilityPct, calibrated_upside_probability_pct AS calibratedUpsideProbabilityPct, downside_probability_pct AS downsideProbabilityPct, drawdown_risk_pct AS drawdownRiskPct, confidence, sample_count AS sampleCount, sector_sample_count AS sectorSampleCount, score_bucket AS scoreBucket, calibration_bucket AS calibrationBucket, calibration_error_pct AS calibrationErrorPct, model_version AS modelVersion, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND model_version = #{modelVersion} AND signal_date = ( SELECT MAX(signal_date) FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND model_version = #{modelVersion} ) AND index_code = ( SELECT selected.index_code FROM ( SELECT index_code FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND model_version = #{modelVersion} AND signal_date = ( SELECT MAX(signal_date) FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND model_version = #{modelVersion} ) GROUP BY index_code ORDER BY CASE index_code WHEN 'SP500' THEN 1 WHEN 'NASDAQ100' THEN 2 WHEN 'DOW30' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END LIMIT 1 ) selected ) ORDER BY horizon_days

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, symbol, snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, sector, industry, exchange, market, currency, close_price AS closePrice, volume, shares_outstanding AS sharesOutstanding, market_cap_usd AS marketCapUsd, price_source AS priceSource, shares_source AS sharesSource, market_cap_source AS marketCapSource, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_market_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC, calculated_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, signal_date AS signalDate, symbol, horizon_days AS horizonDays, model_version AS modelVersion, factor, exposure_score AS exposureScore, coefficient, contribution_pct AS contributionPct, sample_count AS sampleCount, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_expected_return_factor_contribution WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = #{modelVersion} AND horizon_days = #{horizonDays} AND signal_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY signal_date, factor, symbol

SELECT 'Index universe' AS layer, 'UNIVERSE' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT i.symbol) AS symbolCount, 0 AS dateCount, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS latestDate, CAST(NULL AS DATETIME) AS latestCalculatedAt, '현재 지수 편입 종목 기준입니다.' AS note FROM index_constituent i WHERE i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' UNION ALL SELECT 'Signal latest' AS layer, 'SIGNAL_LATEST' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT sl.symbol) AS symbolCount, 0 AS dateCount, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS latestDate, MAX(sl.calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, '리스트/상세 화면이 우선 조회하는 최신 Signal 저장값입니다.' AS note FROM stock_signal_latest sl WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM index_constituent i WHERE i.symbol = sl.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ) UNION ALL SELECT 'Data quality' AS layer, 'DATA_QUALITY' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT dq.symbol) AS symbolCount, 0 AS dateCount, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS latestDate, MAX(dq.calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, '커버리지, 최신성, 이상치, 원천 충돌을 반영한 품질 점수입니다.' AS note FROM stock_data_quality_latest dq WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM index_constituent i WHERE i.symbol = dq.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ) UNION ALL SELECT 'Market snapshot' AS layer, 'MARKET_SNAPSHOT' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT snapshot_date) AS dateCount, MAX(snapshot_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, '일봉 가격, 거래량, 주식수, 시가총액의 point-in-time proxy입니다.' AS note FROM stock_market_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Membership PIT audit' AS layer, 'MEMBERSHIP_PIT' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT snapshot_date) AS dateCount, MAX(snapshot_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, CONCAT( 'Membership snapshot source: ', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT source ORDER BY source SEPARATOR ', '), '-'), '. Current proxy rows are separated from future true PIT rows.' ) AS note FROM stock_index_membership_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND is_member = TRUE UNION ALL SELECT 'Shares PIT audit' AS layer, 'SHARES_PIT' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT snapshot_date) AS dateCount, MAX(snapshot_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, CONCAT( 'Shares snapshot source: ', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT source ORDER BY source SEPARATOR ', '), '-'), '. Current proxy rows are separated from future true PIT rows.' ) AS note FROM stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Benchmark return' AS layer, 'BENCHMARK' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT trade_date) AS dateCount, MAX(trade_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'market-cap weighted benchmark proxy와 초과수익 계산 기준입니다.' AS note FROM stock_benchmark_return_series WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Risk snapshot' AS layer, 'RISK_SNAPSHOT' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT r.symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT r.signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(r.signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(r.calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'beta, trailing volatility, dollar volume을 저장한 포트폴리오 리스크 입력입니다.' AS note FROM stock_risk_snapshot r WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM index_constituent i WHERE i.symbol = r.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' ) UNION ALL SELECT 'Risk-free rate' AS layer, 'RISK_FREE' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT rate_date) AS dateCount, MAX(rate_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN '비어 있으면 포트폴리오 설정값으로 fallback합니다.' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN source LIKE 'CONFIG_%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(*) THEN CONCAT('설정 기반 fallback risk-free rows입니다. source=', COALESCE(MAX(source), '-')) ELSE CONCAT('point-in-time risk-free series입니다. latest source=', COALESCE(MAX(source), '-')) END AS note FROM stock_risk_free_rate_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Macro regime' AS layer, 'MACRO_REGIME' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT snapshot_date) AS dateCount, MAX(snapshot_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'Risk-on/neutral/risk-off 국면과 factor 가중치 조정 입력입니다.' AS note FROM stock_macro_regime_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Macro vintage' AS layer, 'MACRO_VINTAGE' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT series_code) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT observation_date) AS dateCount, MAX(observation_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, CONCAT( 'FRED/ALFRED vintage observation rows. Sources=', COALESCE(GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT source ORDER BY source SEPARATOR ', '), '-') ) AS note FROM stock_macro_vintage_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Macro feature' AS layer, 'MACRO_FEATURE' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT snapshot_date) AS dateCount, MAX(snapshot_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'FRED macro feature snapshot used by Expected Return v8.' AS note FROM stock_macro_feature_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Factor exposure' AS layer, 'FACTOR_EXPOSURE' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, '섹터/시총 중립 factor exposure snapshot입니다.' AS note FROM stock_factor_exposure_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Expected return v4' AS layer, 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V4' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, '국면별 factor 효과를 반영한 기대수익/확률 snapshot입니다.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V4' UNION ALL SELECT 'Expected return v5' AS layer, 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V5' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'Regime-aware nonlinear interaction expected-return snapshot.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V5' UNION ALL SELECT 'Expected return v6' AS layer, 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V6' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'Calibration-stabilized expected-return snapshot used as the current production expected-return layer.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V6' UNION ALL SELECT 'Expected return v7' AS layer, 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V7' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'Horizon-decay stabilized expected-return snapshot used as the current production expected-return layer.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V7' UNION ALL SELECT 'Expected return v8' AS layer, 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V8' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'FRED macro feature adjusted expected-return snapshot used as the current production expected-return layer.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V8' UNION ALL SELECT 'Expected return v9' AS layer, 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'Provenance-stabilized expected-return snapshot used as the current production expected-return layer.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' UNION ALL SELECT 'Factor contribution' AS layer, 'FACTOR_CONTRIBUTION' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT signal_date) AS dateCount, MAX(signal_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'Quant Opinion에서 factor별 기대수익 기여도를 설명하는 원천입니다.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_factor_contribution WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' UNION ALL SELECT 'Probability calibration' AS layer, 'CALIBRATION' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT horizon_days) AS dateCount, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, '상승확률 예측값이 실제 적중률과 얼마나 맞는지 보는 calibration bucket입니다.' AS note FROM stock_expected_return_calibration WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND model_version = 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' UNION ALL SELECT 'Covariance snapshot' AS layer, 'COVARIANCE' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol_a) AS symbolCount, COUNT(DISTINCT snapshot_date) AS dateCount, MAX(snapshot_date) AS latestDate, MAX(calculated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, 'Optimized v3가 고상관 종목 쏠림을 줄일 때 쓰는 공분산 입력입니다.' AS note FROM stock_covariance_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} UNION ALL SELECT 'Portfolio view snapshot' AS layer, 'PORTFOLIO_VIEW' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, 0 AS dateCount, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS latestDate, MAX(generated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, CONCAT( 'Materialized /signals/portfolio payload. Source=', COALESCE(MAX(source), '-') ) AS note FROM stock_portfolio_view_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND view_version = 'PORTFOLIO_OPTIMIZATION_V5' UNION ALL SELECT 'Backtest view snapshot' AS layer, 'BACKTEST_VIEW' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, 0 AS dateCount, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS latestDate, MAX(generated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, CONCAT( 'Materialized /signals/backtest payload. Source=', COALESCE(MAX(source), '-') ) AS note FROM stock_backtest_view_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND view_version = 'BACKTEST_RESEARCH_V1' UNION ALL SELECT 'Quant view snapshot' AS layer, 'DASHBOARD_VIEW' AS metricKey, COUNT(*) AS rowCount, 0 AS symbolCount, 0 AS dateCount, CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS latestDate, MAX(generated_at) AS latestCalculatedAt, CONCAT( 'Materialized /quant payload. Source=', COALESCE(MAX(source), '-') ) AS note FROM stock_dashboard_view_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND view_version = 'DASHBOARD_QUANT_AI_DATA_SOURCES_V2' ORDER BY CASE metricKey WHEN 'UNIVERSE' THEN 1 WHEN 'SIGNAL_LATEST' THEN 2 WHEN 'DATA_QUALITY' THEN 3 WHEN 'MARKET_SNAPSHOT' THEN 4 WHEN 'MEMBERSHIP_PIT' THEN 5 WHEN 'SHARES_PIT' THEN 6 WHEN 'BENCHMARK' THEN 7 WHEN 'RISK_SNAPSHOT' THEN 8 WHEN 'RISK_FREE' THEN 9 WHEN 'MACRO_REGIME' THEN 10 WHEN 'MACRO_VINTAGE' THEN 11 WHEN 'MACRO_FEATURE' THEN 12 WHEN 'FACTOR_EXPOSURE' THEN 13 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V4' THEN 14 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V5' THEN 15 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V6' THEN 16 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V7' THEN 17 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V8' THEN 18 WHEN 'EXPECTED_RETURN_V9' THEN 19 WHEN 'FACTOR_CONTRIBUTION' THEN 20 WHEN 'CALIBRATION' THEN 21 WHEN 'COVARIANCE' THEN 22 WHEN 'PORTFOLIO_VIEW' THEN 23 WHEN 'BACKTEST_VIEW' THEN 24 WHEN 'DASHBOARD_VIEW' THEN 25 ELSE 99 END

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'Finnhub batch' AS operation, status, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, requested_count AS requestedCount, success_count AS successCount, fail_count AS failCount, message FROM finnhub_batch_run ORDER BY started_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_finnhub UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'Yahoo candle batch' AS operation, status, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, requested_count AS requestedCount, success_count AS successCount, fail_count AS failCount, message FROM yahoo_candle_batch_run ORDER BY started_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_yahoo UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'Toss market data batch' AS operation, status, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, requested_count AS requestedCount, success_count AS successCount, fail_count AS failCount, message FROM toss_batch_run ORDER BY started_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_toss UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'SEC EDGAR batch' AS operation, status, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, requested_count AS requestedCount, success_count AS successCount, fail_count AS failCount, message FROM sec_edgar_batch_run ORDER BY started_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_sec UNION ALL SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'Institution 13F batch' AS operation, status, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt, requested_count AS requestedCount, success_count AS successCount, fail_count AS failCount, message FROM institution_13f_batch_run ORDER BY started_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_13f UNION ALL SELECT 'API calls 24h' AS operation, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN status_code IS NULL OR status_code >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'WARNING' ELSE 'OK' END AS status, MAX(requested_at) AS startedAt, MAX(requested_at) AS finishedAt, COUNT(*) AS requestedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status_code BETWEEN 200 AND 399 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status_code IS NULL OR status_code >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failCount, CONCAT( '최근 24시간 API 호출 ', COUNT(*), '건, 실패 ', SUM(CASE WHEN status_code IS NULL OR status_code >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), '건' ) AS message FROM api_call_log WHERE requested_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT 'Membership PIT' AS layer, COUNT(*) AS totalRows, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'OFFICIAL%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CSV_IMPORT%PIT%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS officialRows, 0 AS secRows, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'WIKIPEDIA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS wikipediaRows, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%PROXY%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CURRENT%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%FALLBACK%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS proxyRows, AVG(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'OFFICIAL%' THEN 100 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CSV_IMPORT%PIT%' THEN 90 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'WIKIPEDIA%' THEN 65 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%PROXY%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CURRENT%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%FALLBACK%' THEN 35 ELSE 50 END) AS score FROM stock_index_membership_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND is_member = TRUE UNION ALL SELECT 'Shares PIT' AS layer, COUNT(*) AS totalRows, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'OFFICIAL%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CSV_IMPORT%PIT%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS officialRows, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'SEC%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%SEC%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS secRows, 0 AS wikipediaRows, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%PROXY%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CURRENT%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%FALLBACK%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%FINNHUB%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%TOSS%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%MISSING%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS proxyRows, AVG(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'OFFICIAL%' THEN 100 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CSV_IMPORT%PIT%' THEN 90 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'SEC%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%SEC%' THEN 85 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%PROXY%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE 'CURRENT%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%FALLBACK%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%FINNHUB%' OR UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%TOSS%' THEN 40 WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(source, '')) LIKE '%MISSING%' THEN 0 ELSE 50 END) AS score FROM stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode}
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(sector), '-') FROM index_constituent WHERE symbol = #{symbol} AND current_member = TRUE AND UPPER(COALESCE(sector, '')) <> 'TICKER'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_signal_backtest_result ( snapshot_id, symbol, signal_date, horizon_days, entry_trade_date, entry_close, exit_trade_date, exit_close, forward_return_pct, integrated_score, valuation_score, quality_score, growth_score, stability_score, earnings_score, analyst_score, news_score, momentum_score, risk_score, institution_score, data_quality_score, sector ) VALUES ( #{snapshotId}, #{symbol}, #{signalDate}, #{horizonDays}, #{entryTradeDate}, #{entryClose}, #{exitTradeDate}, #{exitClose}, #{forwardReturnPct}, #{integratedScore}, #{valuationScore}, #{qualityScore}, #{growthScore}, #{stabilityScore}, #{earningsScore}, #{analystScore}, #{newsScore}, #{momentumScore}, #{riskScore}, #{institutionScore}, #{dataQualityScore}, #{sector} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE entry_trade_date = VALUES(entry_trade_date), entry_close = VALUES(entry_close), exit_trade_date = VALUES(exit_trade_date), exit_close = VALUES(exit_close), forward_return_pct = VALUES(forward_return_pct), integrated_score = VALUES(integrated_score), valuation_score = VALUES(valuation_score), quality_score = VALUES(quality_score), growth_score = VALUES(growth_score), stability_score = VALUES(stability_score), earnings_score = VALUES(earnings_score), analyst_score = VALUES(analyst_score), news_score = VALUES(news_score), momentum_score = VALUES(momentum_score), risk_score = VALUES(risk_score), institution_score = VALUES(institution_score), data_quality_score = VALUES(data_quality_score), sector = VALUES(sector), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_risk_snapshot ( symbol, signal_date, beta, volatility_pct, avg_dollar_volume, observations, source ) VALUES ( #{symbol}, #{signalDate}, #{beta}, #{volatilityPct}, #{avgDollarVolume}, #{observations}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE beta = VALUES(beta), volatility_pct = VALUES(volatility_pct), avg_dollar_volume = VALUES(avg_dollar_volume), observations = VALUES(observations), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_benchmark_return_series ( index_code, trade_date, benchmark_level, return_pct, total_market_cap_usd, constituent_count, coverage_count, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{tradeDate}, #{benchmarkLevel}, #{returnPct}, #{totalMarketCapUsd}, #{constituentCount}, #{coverageCount}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE benchmark_level = VALUES(benchmark_level), return_pct = VALUES(return_pct), total_market_cap_usd = VALUES(total_market_cap_usd), constituent_count = VALUES(constituent_count), coverage_count = VALUES(coverage_count), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_index_membership_snapshot ( index_code, symbol, snapshot_date, sector, industry, exchange, is_member, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{symbol}, #{snapshotDate}, #{sector}, #{industry}, #{exchange}, COALESCE(#{member}, TRUE), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{source}, ''), 'CSV_IMPORT') ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sector = VALUES(sector), industry = VALUES(industry), exchange = VALUES(exchange), is_member = VALUES(is_member), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_shares_outstanding_snapshot ( index_code, symbol, snapshot_date, shares_outstanding, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{symbol}, #{snapshotDate}, #{sharesOutstanding}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{source}, ''), 'CSV_IMPORT') ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE shares_outstanding = VALUES(shares_outstanding), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_macro_vintage_snapshot ( index_code, series_code, observation_date, realtime_start, realtime_end, value, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{seriesCode}, #{observationDate}, #{realtimeStart}, #{realtimeEnd}, #{value}, COALESCE(NULLIF(#{source}, ''), 'FRED_API') ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = VALUES(value), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_macro_feature_snapshot ( index_code, snapshot_date, short_rate_pct, long_rate_pct, yield_spread_pct, fed_funds_pct, cpi_yoy_pct, cpi_mom_pct, unemployment_rate_pct, unemployment_change_3m_pct, vix_level, vix_change_20d_pct, dollar_index, dollar_change_20d_pct, macro_tightness_score, macro_growth_stress_score, macro_risk_score, macro_feature_score, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{snapshotDate}, #{shortRatePct}, #{longRatePct}, #{yieldSpreadPct}, #{fedFundsPct}, #{cpiYoyPct}, #{cpiMomPct}, #{unemploymentRatePct}, #{unemploymentChange3mPct}, #{vixLevel}, #{vixChange20dPct}, #{dollarIndex}, #{dollarChange20dPct}, #{macroTightnessScore}, #{macroGrowthStressScore}, #{macroRiskScore}, #{macroFeatureScore}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE short_rate_pct = VALUES(short_rate_pct), long_rate_pct = VALUES(long_rate_pct), yield_spread_pct = VALUES(yield_spread_pct), fed_funds_pct = VALUES(fed_funds_pct), cpi_yoy_pct = VALUES(cpi_yoy_pct), cpi_mom_pct = VALUES(cpi_mom_pct), unemployment_rate_pct = VALUES(unemployment_rate_pct), unemployment_change_3m_pct = VALUES(unemployment_change_3m_pct), vix_level = VALUES(vix_level), vix_change_20d_pct = VALUES(vix_change_20d_pct), dollar_index = VALUES(dollar_index), dollar_change_20d_pct = VALUES(dollar_change_20d_pct), macro_tightness_score = VALUES(macro_tightness_score), macro_growth_stress_score = VALUES(macro_growth_stress_score), macro_risk_score = VALUES(macro_risk_score), macro_feature_score = VALUES(macro_feature_score), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_macro_regime_snapshot ( index_code, snapshot_date, regime_label, macro_score, trend_score, volatility_score, breadth_score, liquidity_score, dollar_score, rate_score, benchmark_return_20d_pct, benchmark_return_60d_pct, realized_volatility_20d_pct, realized_volatility_60d_pct, breadth_advancer_pct, benchmark_coverage_count, vix_level, vix_change_20d_pct, dollar_proxy_return_20d_pct, rate_proxy_return_20d_pct, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{snapshotDate}, #{regimeLabel}, #{macroScore}, #{trendScore}, #{volatilityScore}, #{breadthScore}, #{liquidityScore}, #{dollarScore}, #{rateScore}, #{benchmarkReturn20dPct}, #{benchmarkReturn60dPct}, #{realizedVolatility20dPct}, #{realizedVolatility60dPct}, #{breadthAdvancerPct}, #{benchmarkCoverageCount}, #{vixLevel}, #{vixChange20dPct}, #{dollarProxyReturn20dPct}, #{rateProxyReturn20dPct}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE regime_label = VALUES(regime_label), macro_score = VALUES(macro_score), trend_score = VALUES(trend_score), volatility_score = VALUES(volatility_score), breadth_score = VALUES(breadth_score), liquidity_score = VALUES(liquidity_score), dollar_score = VALUES(dollar_score), rate_score = VALUES(rate_score), benchmark_return_20d_pct = VALUES(benchmark_return_20d_pct), benchmark_return_60d_pct = VALUES(benchmark_return_60d_pct), realized_volatility_20d_pct = VALUES(realized_volatility_20d_pct), realized_volatility_60d_pct = VALUES(realized_volatility_60d_pct), breadth_advancer_pct = VALUES(breadth_advancer_pct), benchmark_coverage_count = VALUES(benchmark_coverage_count), vix_level = VALUES(vix_level), vix_change_20d_pct = VALUES(vix_change_20d_pct), dollar_proxy_return_20d_pct = VALUES(dollar_proxy_return_20d_pct), rate_proxy_return_20d_pct = VALUES(rate_proxy_return_20d_pct), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_correlation_snapshot ( index_code, snapshot_date, symbol_a, symbol_b, correlation, observations, lookback_days, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{snapshotDate}, #{symbolA}, #{symbolB}, #{correlation}, #{observations}, #{lookbackDays}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE correlation = VALUES(correlation), observations = VALUES(observations), lookback_days = VALUES(lookback_days), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_covariance_snapshot ( index_code, snapshot_date, symbol_a, symbol_b, covariance, volatility_a_pct, volatility_b_pct, observations, lookback_days, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{snapshotDate}, #{symbolA}, #{symbolB}, #{covariance}, #{volatilityAPct}, #{volatilityBPct}, #{observations}, #{lookbackDays}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE covariance = VALUES(covariance), volatility_a_pct = VALUES(volatility_a_pct), volatility_b_pct = VALUES(volatility_b_pct), observations = VALUES(observations), lookback_days = VALUES(lookback_days), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_expected_return_snapshot ( index_code, signal_date, symbol, horizon_days, expected_return_pct, expected_excess_return_pct, return_p10_pct, return_p50_pct, return_p90_pct, excess_p10_pct, excess_p50_pct, excess_p90_pct, upside_probability_pct, calibrated_upside_probability_pct, downside_probability_pct, drawdown_risk_pct, confidence, sample_count, sector_sample_count, score_bucket, calibration_bucket, calibration_error_pct, model_version, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{signalDate}, #{symbol}, #{horizonDays}, #{expectedReturnPct}, #{expectedExcessReturnPct}, #{returnP10Pct}, #{returnP50Pct}, #{returnP90Pct}, #{excessP10Pct}, #{excessP50Pct}, #{excessP90Pct}, #{upsideProbabilityPct}, #{calibratedUpsideProbabilityPct}, #{downsideProbabilityPct}, #{drawdownRiskPct}, #{confidence}, #{sampleCount}, #{sectorSampleCount}, #{scoreBucket}, #{calibrationBucket}, #{calibrationErrorPct}, #{modelVersion}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE expected_return_pct = VALUES(expected_return_pct), expected_excess_return_pct = VALUES(expected_excess_return_pct), return_p10_pct = VALUES(return_p10_pct), return_p50_pct = VALUES(return_p50_pct), return_p90_pct = VALUES(return_p90_pct), excess_p10_pct = VALUES(excess_p10_pct), excess_p50_pct = VALUES(excess_p50_pct), excess_p90_pct = VALUES(excess_p90_pct), upside_probability_pct = VALUES(upside_probability_pct), calibrated_upside_probability_pct = VALUES(calibrated_upside_probability_pct), downside_probability_pct = VALUES(downside_probability_pct), drawdown_risk_pct = VALUES(drawdown_risk_pct), confidence = VALUES(confidence), sample_count = VALUES(sample_count), sector_sample_count = VALUES(sector_sample_count), score_bucket = VALUES(score_bucket), calibration_bucket = VALUES(calibration_bucket), calibration_error_pct = VALUES(calibration_error_pct), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_factor_exposure_snapshot ( index_code, signal_date, symbol, factor, raw_score, exposure_score, sector, market_cap, data_quality_score, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{signalDate}, #{symbol}, #{factor}, #{rawScore}, #{exposureScore}, #{sector}, #{marketCap}, #{dataQualityScore}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE raw_score = VALUES(raw_score), exposure_score = VALUES(exposure_score), sector = VALUES(sector), market_cap = VALUES(market_cap), data_quality_score = VALUES(data_quality_score), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_expected_return_factor_contribution ( index_code, signal_date, symbol, horizon_days, model_version, factor, exposure_score, coefficient, contribution_pct, sample_count, source ) SELECT index_code, signal_date, symbol, horizon_days, #{targetModelVersion}, factor, exposure_score, coefficient, contribution_pct, sample_count, #{source} FROM stock_expected_return_factor_contribution WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND signal_date = #{signalDate} AND model_version = #{sourceModelVersion} AND horizon_days = 20 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE exposure_score = VALUES(exposure_score), coefficient = VALUES(coefficient), contribution_pct = VALUES(contribution_pct), sample_count = VALUES(sample_count), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_expected_return_factor_contribution ( index_code, signal_date, symbol, horizon_days, model_version, factor, exposure_score, coefficient, contribution_pct, sample_count, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{signalDate}, #{symbol}, #{horizonDays}, #{modelVersion}, #{factor}, #{exposureScore}, #{coefficient}, #{contributionPct}, #{sampleCount}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE exposure_score = VALUES(exposure_score), coefficient = VALUES(coefficient), contribution_pct = VALUES(contribution_pct), sample_count = VALUES(sample_count), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_expected_return_calibration ( index_code, model_version, horizon_days, probability_bucket, sample_count, average_predicted_upside_pct, actual_upside_rate_pct, calibration_error_pct, brier_score, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{modelVersion}, #{horizonDays}, #{probabilityBucket}, #{sampleCount}, #{averagePredictedUpsidePct}, #{actualUpsideRatePct}, #{calibrationErrorPct}, #{brierScore}, #{source} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sample_count = VALUES(sample_count), average_predicted_upside_pct = VALUES(average_predicted_upside_pct), actual_upside_rate_pct = VALUES(actual_upside_rate_pct), calibration_error_pct = VALUES(calibration_error_pct), brier_score = VALUES(brier_score), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO stock_portfolio_view_snapshot ( index_code, view_version, generated_at, source, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{viewVersion}, COALESCE(#{generatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{source}, ''), 'ON_DEMAND'), #{payloadJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE generated_at = VALUES(generated_at), source = VALUES(source), payload_json = VALUES(payload_json)

INSERT INTO stock_dashboard_view_snapshot ( index_code, view_version, generated_at, source, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{viewVersion}, COALESCE(#{generatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{source}, ''), 'ON_DEMAND'), #{payloadJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE generated_at = VALUES(generated_at), source = VALUES(source), payload_json = VALUES(payload_json)

INSERT INTO stock_backtest_view_snapshot ( index_code, view_version, generated_at, source, payload_json ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{viewVersion}, COALESCE(#{generatedAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{source}, ''), 'ON_DEMAND'), #{payloadJson} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE generated_at = VALUES(generated_at), source = VALUES(source), payload_json = VALUES(payload_json)

INSERT INTO stock_optimizer_shadow_snapshot ( index_code, signal_date, horizon_days, top_count, weighting, baseline_optimizer, candidate_optimizer, solver_status, usable, message, baseline_objective, candidate_objective, objective_gap, weight_distance_pct, baseline_net_return_pct, candidate_net_return_pct, benchmark_return_pct, candidate_turnover_pct, candidate_transaction_cost_pct, candidate_beta, candidate_volatility_pct, candidate_liquidity, candidate_max_sector_weight_pct, candidate_max_position_weight_pct, candidate_active_sector_deviation_pct, candidate_invested_weight_pct, beta_breach, volatility_breach, sector_breach, position_breach, turnover_breach, objective_breach, weight_distance_breach, constraint_breach_count, source ) VALUES ( #{indexCode}, #{signalDate}, #{horizonDays}, #{topCount}, #{weighting}, #{baselineOptimizer}, #{candidateOptimizer}, #{solverStatus}, COALESCE(#{usable}, FALSE), #{message}, #{baselineObjective}, #{candidateObjective}, #{objectiveGap}, #{weightDistancePct}, #{baselineNetReturnPct}, #{candidateNetReturnPct}, #{benchmarkReturnPct}, #{candidateTurnoverPct}, #{candidateTransactionCostPct}, #{candidateBeta}, #{candidateVolatilityPct}, #{candidateLiquidity}, #{candidateMaxSectorWeightPct}, #{candidateMaxPositionWeightPct}, #{candidateActiveSectorDeviationPct}, #{candidateInvestedWeightPct}, COALESCE(#{betaBreach}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{volatilityBreach}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{sectorBreach}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{positionBreach}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{turnoverBreach}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{objectiveBreach}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{weightDistanceBreach}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{constraintBreachCount}, 0), COALESCE(NULLIF(#{source}, ''), 'OJALGO_QP_SHADOW_V1') ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE baseline_optimizer = VALUES(baseline_optimizer), solver_status = VALUES(solver_status), usable = VALUES(usable), message = VALUES(message), baseline_objective = VALUES(baseline_objective), candidate_objective = VALUES(candidate_objective), objective_gap = VALUES(objective_gap), weight_distance_pct = VALUES(weight_distance_pct), baseline_net_return_pct = VALUES(baseline_net_return_pct), candidate_net_return_pct = VALUES(candidate_net_return_pct), benchmark_return_pct = VALUES(benchmark_return_pct), candidate_turnover_pct = VALUES(candidate_turnover_pct), candidate_transaction_cost_pct = VALUES(candidate_transaction_cost_pct), candidate_beta = VALUES(candidate_beta), candidate_volatility_pct = VALUES(candidate_volatility_pct), candidate_liquidity = VALUES(candidate_liquidity), candidate_max_sector_weight_pct = VALUES(candidate_max_sector_weight_pct), candidate_max_position_weight_pct = VALUES(candidate_max_position_weight_pct), candidate_active_sector_deviation_pct = VALUES(candidate_active_sector_deviation_pct), candidate_invested_weight_pct = VALUES(candidate_invested_weight_pct), beta_breach = VALUES(beta_breach), volatility_breach = VALUES(volatility_breach), sector_breach = VALUES(sector_breach), position_breach = VALUES(position_breach), turnover_breach = VALUES(turnover_breach), objective_breach = VALUES(objective_breach), weight_distance_breach = VALUES(weight_distance_breach), constraint_breach_count = VALUES(constraint_breach_count), source = VALUES(source), calculated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT index_code AS indexCode, signal_date AS signalDate, horizon_days AS horizonDays, top_count AS topCount, weighting, baseline_optimizer AS baselineOptimizer, candidate_optimizer AS candidateOptimizer, solver_status AS solverStatus, usable, message, baseline_objective AS baselineObjective, candidate_objective AS candidateObjective, objective_gap AS objectiveGap, weight_distance_pct AS weightDistancePct, baseline_net_return_pct AS baselineNetReturnPct, candidate_net_return_pct AS candidateNetReturnPct, benchmark_return_pct AS benchmarkReturnPct, candidate_turnover_pct AS candidateTurnoverPct, candidate_transaction_cost_pct AS candidateTransactionCostPct, candidate_beta AS candidateBeta, candidate_volatility_pct AS candidateVolatilityPct, candidate_liquidity AS candidateLiquidity, candidate_max_sector_weight_pct AS candidateMaxSectorWeightPct, candidate_max_position_weight_pct AS candidateMaxPositionWeightPct, candidate_active_sector_deviation_pct AS candidateActiveSectorDeviationPct, candidate_invested_weight_pct AS candidateInvestedWeightPct, beta_breach AS betaBreach, volatility_breach AS volatilityBreach, sector_breach AS sectorBreach, position_breach AS positionBreach, turnover_breach AS turnoverBreach, objective_breach AS objectiveBreach, weight_distance_breach AS weightDistanceBreach, constraint_breach_count AS constraintBreachCount, source, calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_optimizer_shadow_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND candidate_optimizer = #{candidateOptimizer} ORDER BY signal_date DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.snapshot_id AS snapshotId, r.symbol, COALESCE(p.name, i.name, r.symbol) AS name, r.signal_date AS signalDate, r.horizon_days AS horizonDays, r.entry_trade_date AS entryTradeDate, r.entry_close AS entryClose, r.exit_trade_date AS exitTradeDate, r.exit_close AS exitClose, r.forward_return_pct AS forwardReturnPct, r.integrated_score AS integratedScore, r.valuation_score AS valuationScore, r.quality_score AS qualityScore, r.growth_score AS growthScore, r.stability_score AS stabilityScore, r.earnings_score AS earningsScore, r.analyst_score AS analystScore, r.news_score AS newsScore, r.momentum_score AS momentumScore, r.risk_score AS riskScore, r.institution_score AS institutionScore, r.data_quality_score AS dataQualityScore, COALESCE(ms.market_cap_usd / 1000000, p.market_cap) AS marketCap, r.sector, r.calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_signal_backtest_result r INNER JOIN index_constituent i ON i.symbol = r.symbol AND i.index_code = #{indexCode} AND i.current_member = TRUE AND i.symbol NOT IN ('TICKER', 'SECURITY') AND UPPER(COALESCE(i.sector, '')) <> 'TICKER' LEFT JOIN company_profile p ON p.symbol = r.symbol LEFT JOIN stock_market_snapshot ms ON ms.index_code = #{indexCode} AND ms.symbol = r.symbol AND ms.snapshot_date = r.signal_date ORDER BY r.signal_date DESC, r.symbol, r.horizon_days LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.snapshot_id AS snapshotId, r.symbol, r.signal_date AS signalDate, r.horizon_days AS horizonDays, r.entry_trade_date AS entryTradeDate, r.entry_close AS entryClose, r.exit_trade_date AS exitTradeDate, r.exit_close AS exitClose, r.forward_return_pct AS forwardReturnPct, r.sector, r.calculated_at AS calculatedAt FROM stock_signal_backtest_result r WHERE r.horizon_days = #{horizonDays} AND r.signal_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM stock_index_membership_snapshot m WHERE m.index_code = #{indexCode} AND m.symbol = r.symbol AND m.snapshot_date = r.signal_date ) ORDER BY r.signal_date, r.symbol

SELECT index_code AS indexCode, symbol, snapshot_date AS snapshotDate, sector, industry, exchange, is_member AS member, source FROM stock_index_membership_snapshot WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND snapshot_date BETWEEN #{fromDate} AND #{toDate} ORDER BY snapshot_date, symbol
mapper.update: UPDATE stock_expected_return_evaluation_run SET status = #{status}, decision = #{decision}, valid_months = #{validMonths}, target_row_count = #{targetRowCount}, valid_row_count = #{validRowCount}, coverage_pct = #{coveragePct}, rank_ic = #{rankIc}, brier_score = #{brierScore}, annualized_excess_return_pct = #{annualizedExcessReturnPct}, checks_json = #{checksJson}, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, finished_at = #{finishedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'RUNNING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_expected_return_evaluation_window ( run_id, window_id, test_from, test_to, model_version, status, train_row_count, test_row_count, rank_ic, positive_ic_date_pct, mae_pct, directional_accuracy_pct, brier_score, calibration_error_pct, interval_coverage_pct, quintile_spread_pct, net_return_pct, annualized_excess_return_pct, sharpe, maximum_drawdown_pct, turnover_pct, transaction_cost_pct ) VALUES ( #{runId}, #{windowId}, #{testFrom}, #{testTo}, #{modelVersion}, #{status}, #{trainRowCount}, #{testRowCount}, #{metrics.rankIc}, #{metrics.positiveIcDatePct}, #{metrics.maePct}, #{metrics.directionalAccuracyPct}, #{metrics.brierScore}, #{metrics.calibrationErrorPct}, #{metrics.intervalCoveragePct}, #{metrics.quintileSpreadPct}, #{portfolio.netReturnPct}, #{portfolio.annualizedExcessReturnPct}, #{portfolio.sharpe}, #{portfolio.maximumDrawdownPct}, #{portfolio.turnoverPct}, #{portfolio.transactionCostPct} )
INSERT INTO stock_expected_return_evaluation_exclusion_count (run_id, exclusion_code, row_count) VALUES (#{runId}, #{code}, #{rowCount})
mapper.select: SELECT id, contract_version AS contractVersion, index_code AS indexCode, baseline_model_version AS baselineModelVersion, candidate_model_version AS candidateModelVersion, as_of_date AS asOfDate, status, decision, valid_months AS validMonths, target_row_count AS targetRowCount, valid_row_count AS validRowCount, coverage_pct AS coveragePct, rank_ic AS rankIc, brier_score AS brierScore, annualized_excess_return_pct AS annualizedExcessReturnPct, checks_json AS checksJson, error_code AS errorCode, error_message AS errorMessage, started_at AS startedAt, finished_at AS finishedAt FROM stock_expected_return_evaluation_run WHERE index_code = #{indexCode} AND contract_version = #{contractVersion} AND status IN ('COMPLETED', 'INSUFFICIENT_DATA', 'FAILED') ORDER BY finished_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
